data.title: Asia And Europe Markets Mixed, Futures Rebound Ahead Of Nvidia Earnings - Global Markets Today While US Slept
KKR Clinches $400 Million Deal To Take Controlling Stake In India's Cancer Hospital Chain HCG: Details
data.description: KKR & CVC Asia V reach definitive agreements to become the largest shareholder in HCG for $400M, with SEBI's Takeover Regulations allowing KKR to acquire up to 77% ownership. Founder will become Non-Executive Chairman as KKR strengthens its focus on India's healthcare sector.

data.title: Nokia Partners with Globe Telecom To Tackle Fraud In Banking With Secure APIs
data.description: Nokia partners with Globe Telecom for enhanced security via network APIs. NEP platform will help with control and security, and follows GSMA standard.

data.title: Wall Street Looks To Bounce Back After Friday's Rough Ride Triggered By Consumer Sentiment: Analyst Says 'We Continue To Place Our Bets' On Economy's Resilience
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Monday, following Friday's selloff. Futures of all four benchmark indices were trading higher.

data.title: Lucid Awards Limited Edition Lucid Air Sapphire With Lavender Finish To Winner Of Saudi Cup 2025
data.description: EV startup Lucid Motors awarded a custom Lucid Air Saphhire to the winner of the Saudi Cup over the weekend, complete with a lavender exterior.
